title: citrus longilimon
intro: Citrus longilimon, also known as the fingered citron, is a species of citrus plant characterized by its unique finger-like protrusions on the surface of its fruit. The medicinal properties of Citrus longilimon include its high concentration of limonene, a compound that has been shown to exhibit anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of using Citrus longilimon include its potential to aid in digestion, relieve stress, and boost the immune system, while also providing antioxidant and anti-cancer properties. Citrus longilimon can be prepared into various herbal remedies, including teas, infusions, and essential oils, which can be used for medicinal purposes or as a natural health supplement.
